headline: Putrajaya Autonomous Vehicle Trial Covers 15km Route
context: Putrajaya launched Malaysia first autonomous vehicle trial in January 2026 with 3 vehicles operating on a 15km fixed route.

cards.big: 3 autonomous vehicles operating on 15km Putrajaya route since January 2026
cards.sub: Malaysia first public autonomous vehicle trial carries 200 passengers daily

cards.big: Vehicles operate at 30km/h on dedicated lane with safety driver present
cards.sub: Trial cost RM18 million funded jointly by MOSTI and Japanese consortium

cards.big: 12-month trial will collect 500,000km of driving data for road conditions
cards.sub: Data used to develop Malaysian-specific autonomous driving parameters

cards.big: Public acceptance survey showed 62% willing to use autonomous vehicles
cards.sub: Safety concerns remain primary hesitation cited by 38% of respondents

cards.big: Autonomous trials test whether Malaysia can develop local mobility technology
15km autonomous vehicle trial in Putrajaya. Pilots need scaling plans, not just technology demonstrations.
